textByHash.c5032b82aff2771660853aff8e73e1122d44eb35: Human! To attack these creatures would be a threat to the balance. Only those with permission may fight them!
textByHash.e32d03104a355be8147a38568f7d92839313c4fc: Human. The Drakes through this tunnel are not to be killed without permission. To do so would be an affront to the balance.
